ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dropdown_menus" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dropdown menu configuration */,
  "border" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether a border is added between menu items */,
  "button_class_name" TEXT /* Custom class name to be applied to the dropdown button */,
  "close_on_menu_click" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the menu closes on a menu item click */,
  "disable_scrim" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the scrim (overlay) is disabled */,
  "drop_caret" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the drop caret is rendered */,
  "responsive_design" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the dropdown menu is responsive */,
  "accessibility_level" TEXT /* Level of accessibility for the dropdown menu */,
  "default_theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the default theme for the dropdown menu */,
  "default_template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the default template for the dropdown menu */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dropdown menu this item belongs to */,
  "item_text" TEXT /* Text to be displayed for the menu item */,
  "item_url" TEXT /* URL that the menu item links to */,
  "item_disabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the menu item is disabled */,
  "item_icon" TEXT /* Icon class or URL for the menu item */,
  "item_tooltip" TEXT /* Tooltip text for the menu item */,
  "item_order" INTEGER /* Order of the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES dropdown_menus ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style configuration */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item this style configuration applies to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Class name to be applied to the menu item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Inline style to be applied to the menu item */,
  "hover_style" TEXT /* Inline style for the menu item on hover */,
  "active_style" TEXT /* Inline style for the menu item when active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_styles_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_accessibility" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessibility configuration */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dropdown menu this configuration applies to */,
  "aria_label" TEXT /* ARIA label for accessibility purposes */,
  "tab_index" INTEGER /* Tab index for keyboard navigation */,
  "aria_expanded" TEXT /* ARIA expanded attribute value */,
  "aria_controls" TEXT /* ARIA controls attribute value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_accessibility_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES dropdown_menus ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme configuration */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dropdown menu this theme configuration applies to */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "theme_styles" TEXT /* CSS styles for the theme */,
  "theme_icon" TEXT /* Icon class or URL for the theme */,
  "theme_description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_themes_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES dropdown_menus ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_html" TEXT /* HTML content of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the template */,
  "template_icon" TEXT /* Icon class or URL for the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_menu_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dropdown menu used in the project */,
  "menu_position" TEXT /* Position of the menu within the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_menu_mappings_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES dropdown_menus ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_menu_mappings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the project */,
  "developer_status" TEXT /* Status of the developer */,
  "developer_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_developer_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer working on the project */,
  "developer_role" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_developer_mappings_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_developer_mappings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "version_tag" TEXT /* Tag or label for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_project_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component version used in the project */,
  "version_usage" TEXT /* How the version is used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_project_mappings_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES component_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_project_mappings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component version the issue is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who reported the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  "issue_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_issues_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES component_versions ("version_id")
)
